v_anomaly_guardrail_blocks:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_anomaly_guardrail_blocks (
  requester,
  team,
  department,
  role,
  request_date,
  guardrail_category,
  guardrail_type,
  blocked_count,
  severity,
  explanation)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS WITH user_daily_blocks AS (
  SELECT
    u.requester,
    COALESCE(d.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team'))       AS team,
    COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')) AS department,
    COALESCE(d.role,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.role'))       AS role,
    u.request_date,
    u.guardrail_category,
    count(*)                                                                 AS blocked_count
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
  LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d
    ON u.requester = d.user_email
  WHERE u.guardrail_triggered = true
  GROUP BY u.requester,
    COALESCE(d.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team')),
    COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')),
    COALESCE(d.role,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.role')),
    u.request_date,
    u.guardrail_category
)
SELECT
  requester, team, department, role, request_date,
  guardrail_category,
  CASE
    WHEN guardrail_category LIKE '%PII%'        THEN 'PII_DETECTION'
    WHEN guardrail_category LIKE '%CREDENTIAL%' THEN 'CREDENTIAL_PROTECTION'
    WHEN guardrail_category LIKE '%JAILBREAK%'  THEN 'JAILBREAK_PREVENTION'
    WHEN guardrail_category LIKE '%POLICY%'     THEN 'POLICY_ENFORCEMENT'
    ELSE                                             'CONTENT_POLICY'
  END AS guardrail_type,
  blocked_count,
  CASE
    WHEN blocked_count >= 10 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN blocked_count >= 5  THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN blocked_count >= 2  THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE                          'LOW'
  END AS severity,
  CONCAT(
    requester, ' had ', blocked_count, ' prompt(s) blocked by AI Gateway guardrail [',
    guardrail_category, '] on ', request_date, '. ',
    'Guardrail type: ',
    CASE
      WHEN guardrail_category LIKE '%PII%'        THEN 'PII_DETECTION'
      WHEN guardrail_category LIKE '%CREDENTIAL%' THEN 'CREDENTIAL_PROTECTION'
      WHEN guardrail_category LIKE '%JAILBREAK%'  THEN 'JAILBREAK_PREVENTION'
      ELSE                                             'POLICY_ENFORCEMENT'
    END, '. ',
    'Role: ', COALESCE(role, 'unknown'), '. ',
    'Review whether this is a persistent policy violation or a one-off false positive.'
  ) AS explanation
FROM user_daily_blocks
ORDER BY request_date DESC, blocked_count DESC
v_anomaly_model_misuse:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_anomaly_model_misuse (
  requester,
  team,
  request_date,
  destination_model,
  use_case_category,
  request_count,
  total_tokens_wasted,
  actual_cost_usd,
  haiku_cost_usd,
  savings_if_routed_usd,
  severity,
  explanation)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS SELECT
  u.requester,
  COALESCE(d.team, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team'))               AS team,
  u.request_date,
  u.destination_model,
  get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.use_case_category')                    AS use_case_category,
  count(*)                                                                   AS request_count,
  sum(u.total_tokens)                                                        AS total_tokens_wasted,
  ROUND(sum((u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0), 2) AS actual_cost_usd,
  -- What it WOULD have cost on Haiku
  ROUND(sum(u.input_tokens) * 0.80 / 1000000 + sum(u.output_tokens) * 4.0 / 1000000, 2) as haiku_cost_usd,
  ROUND(sum((u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0) - (sum(u.input_tokens) * 0.80 / 1000000 + sum(u.output_tokens) * 4.0 / 1000000), 2) as savings_if_routed_usd,
  CASE
    WHEN count(*) > 20 THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN count(*) > 10 THEN 'MEDIUM'
    WHEN count(*) > 5 THEN 'LOW'
    ELSE 'NORMAL'
  END as severity,
  CONCAT(
    u.requester, ' used Sonnet (expensive) for ', count(*), ' trivial queries on ', u.request_date,
    '. Cost: $', ROUND(sum((u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0), 2),
    '. If routed to Haiku: $', ROUND(sum(u.input_tokens) * 0.80 / 1000000 + sum(u.output_tokens) * 4.0 / 1000000, 2),
    '. Potential saving: $', ROUND(sum((u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0) - (sum(u.input_tokens) * 0.80 / 1000000 + sum(u.output_tokens) * 4.0 / 1000000), 2),
    '. Recommendation: set up AI Gateway auto-routing to downgrade trivial queries to Haiku.'
  ) as explanation
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d ON u.requester = d.user_email
WHERE u.destination_model = 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
  AND get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.use_case_category') = 'trivial'
GROUP BY u.requester,
  COALESCE(d.team, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team')),
  u.request_date, u.destination_model,
  get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.use_case_category')
HAVING count(*) > 5
ORDER BY request_date DESC, request_count DESC
v_anomaly_off_hours:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_anomaly_off_hours (
  requester,
  team,
  department,
  request_date,
  request_hour,
  requests_in_hour,
  is_late_night,
  is_weekend,
  normal_pct_at_this_hour,
  severity,
  explanation)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS WITH user_hour_profile AS (
  SELECT
    requester,
    hour(event_time) AS hr,
    count(*)         AS requests_at_hour
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
  GROUP BY requester, hour(event_time)
),
user_total AS (
  SELECT requester, sum(requests_at_hour) as total_requests
  FROM user_hour_profile
  GROUP BY requester
),
user_pct AS (
  SELECT p.requester, p.hr,
    ROUND(p.requests_at_hour * 100.0 / t.total_requests, 1) as pct_of_traffic
  FROM user_hour_profile p
  JOIN user_total t ON p.requester = t.requester
),
off_hours_requests AS (
  SELECT
    u.requester,
    COALESCE(d2.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team'))       AS team,
    COALESCE(d2.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')) AS department,
    u.request_date,
    hour(u.event_time) as request_hour,
    count(*) as requests_in_hour,
    CASE WHEN hour(u.event_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN true ELSE false END as is_late_night,
    CASE WHEN dayofweek(u.event_time) IN (1, 7) THEN true ELSE false END as is_weekend
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
  LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d2 ON u.requester = d2.user_email
  WHERE hour(u.event_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5
     OR dayofweek(u.event_time) IN (1, 7)
  GROUP BY u.requester,
    COALESCE(d2.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team')),
    COALESCE(d2.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')),
    u.request_date, hour(u.event_time),
    CASE WHEN hour(u.event_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN true ELSE false END,
    CASE WHEN dayofweek(u.event_time) IN (1, 7) THEN true ELSE false END
)
SELECT
  o.*,
  COALESCE(p.pct_of_traffic, 0) as normal_pct_at_this_hour,
  CASE
    WHEN o.is_late_night AND o.requests_in_hour > 5 THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN o.is_late_night AND o.requests_in_hour > 2 THEN 'MEDIUM'
    WHEN o.is_weekend AND o.requests_in_hour > 10 THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE 'LOW'
  END as severity,
  CASE
    WHEN o.is_late_night THEN CONCAT(
      o.requester, ' made ', o.requests_in_hour, ' requests at ',
      o.request_hour, ':00 on ', o.request_date,
      ' (late night). Only ', COALESCE(p.pct_of_traffic, 0),
      '% of their traffic normally occurs at this hour. ',
      'Action: verify this was the actual user and not a compromised credential.'
    )
    WHEN o.is_weekend THEN CONCAT(
      o.requester, ' made ', o.requests_in_hour, ' requests on weekend (',
      o.request_date, ') at ', o.request_hour, ':00. ',
      'This may be legitimate weekend work or could indicate automated/unauthorized usage.'
    )
    ELSE NULL
  END as explanation
FROM off_hours_requests o
LEFT JOIN user_pct p ON o.requester = p.requester AND o.request_hour = p.hr
WHERE o.requests_in_hour > 2
v_anomaly_rate_limit_breaches:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_anomaly_rate_limit_breaches (
  requester,
  team,
  department,
  role,
  request_date,
  total_requests,
  rate_limited_count,
  tokens_consumed,
  rate_limit_type,
  baseline_avg_429,
  block_rate_pct,
  severity,
  explanation)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS WITH user_daily AS (
  SELECT
    u.requester,
    COALESCE(d.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team'))       AS team,
    COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')) AS department,
    COALESCE(d.role,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.role'))       AS role,
    u.request_date,
    count(*)                                                                 AS total_requests,
    count_if(u.status_code = 429)                                            AS rate_limited_count,
    sum(CASE WHEN u.status_code = 200 THEN u.total_tokens ELSE 0 END)       AS tokens_consumed,
    -- Pull rate_limit_type from 429 response payload in inference logs
    -- Real AI Gateway format: top-level $.rate_limit_type (values: USER_DAILY_LIMIT, ENDPOINT_BUDGET)
    MAX(get_json_object(i.response, '$.rate_limit_type'))                   AS rate_limit_type
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
  LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d
    ON u.requester = d.user_email
  LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs i
    ON u.request_id = i.databricks_request_id
    AND u.status_code = 429
    AND i.status_code = 429
  GROUP BY u.requester,
    COALESCE(d.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team')),
    COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')),
    COALESCE(d.role,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.role')),
    u.request_date
  HAVING count_if(u.status_code = 429) > 0
),
with_baseline AS (
  SELECT *,
    ROUND(AVG(rate_limited_count) OVER (
      PARTITION BY requester ORDER BY request_date
      ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
    ), 1) AS baseline_avg_429
  FROM user_daily
)
SELECT
  requester, team, department, role, request_date,
  total_requests, rate_limited_count, tokens_consumed,
  COALESCE(rate_limit_type, 'USER_DAILY_LIMIT')                              AS rate_limit_type,
  COALESCE(baseline_avg_429, 0)                                              AS baseline_avg_429,
  ROUND(rate_limited_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_requests, 0), 1)           AS block_rate_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN rate_limited_count >= 15 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN rate_limited_count >= 8  THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN rate_limited_count >= 3  THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE                               'LOW'
  END AS severity,
  CONCAT(
    requester, ' hit the AI Gateway rate limit ', rate_limited_count, ' time(s) on ', request_date,
    ' (', ROUND(rate_limited_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_requests, 0), 1), '% of requests blocked). ',
    'Limit type: ', COALESCE(rate_limit_type, 'USER_DAILY_LIMIT'), '. ',
    'Role: ', COALESCE(role, 'unknown'), '. ',
    'Tokens consumed before hitting limit: ', tokens_consumed, '. ',
    'Baseline avg 429s/day: ', COALESCE(baseline_avg_429, 0), '. ',
    'Consider raising the daily budget or reviewing usage pattern.'
  ) AS explanation
FROM with_baseline
ORDER BY request_date DESC, rate_limited_count DESC
v_anomaly_sensitive_queries:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_anomaly_sensitive_queries (
  databricks_request_id,
  request_date,
  request_time,
  requester,
  user_prompt,
  sensitivity_type,
  severity,
  explanation)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS SELECT * FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.sensitive_queries_classified
v_anomaly_summary:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_anomaly_summary (
  requester,
  team,
  department,
  request_date,
  anomaly_type,
  severity,
  metric_summary,
  anomaly_value,
  baseline_value,
  explanation,
  sample_prompt)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS SELECT
  v.requester, v.team, v.department, v.request_date,
  'VOLUME_SPIKE' AS anomaly_type, v.severity,
  CONCAT(v.daily_requests, ' requests (', v.multiplier_vs_baseline, 'x normal)') AS metric_summary,
  v.daily_requests AS anomaly_value, v.baseline_avg_requests AS baseline_value,
  v.explanation,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_volume_spike v
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT requester, request_date, request FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs
  WHERE status_code = 200
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY requester, request_date ORDER BY request_time DESC) = 1
) i ON v.requester = i.requester AND v.request_date = i.request_date
WHERE v.severity != 'NORMAL'

UNION ALL

-- 2. Token Burn
SELECT
  v.requester, v.team, v.department, v.request_date,
  'TOKEN_BURN' AS anomaly_type, v.severity,
  CONCAT(v.avg_tokens_per_request, ' tokens/req (', v.token_multiplier, 'x normal)') AS metric_summary,
  v.avg_tokens_per_request AS anomaly_value, v.baseline_avg_tokens_per_req AS baseline_value,
  v.explanation,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_token_burn v
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT requester, request_date, request FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs
  WHERE status_code = 200
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY requester, request_date ORDER BY execution_duration_ms DESC) = 1
) i ON v.requester = i.requester AND v.request_date = i.request_date
WHERE v.severity != 'NORMAL'

UNION ALL

-- 3. Model Misuse
SELECT
  v.requester, v.team, NULL AS department, v.request_date,
  'MODEL_MISUSE' AS anomaly_type, v.severity,
  CONCAT(v.request_count, ' trivial queries on Sonnet ($', v.actual_cost_usd, ' wasted)') AS metric_summary,
  v.request_count AS anomaly_value, 5 AS baseline_value,
  v.explanation,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_model_misuse v
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT requester, request_date, request FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs
  WHERE status_code = 200
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY requester, request_date ORDER BY request_time DESC) = 1
) i ON v.requester = i.requester AND v.request_date = i.request_date

UNION ALL

-- 4. Off-Hours Activity
SELECT
  v.requester, v.team, v.department, v.request_date,
  CASE WHEN v.is_late_night THEN 'LATE_NIGHT_ACCESS' ELSE 'WEEKEND_ACCESS' END AS anomaly_type,
  v.severity,
  CONCAT(v.requests_in_hour, ' requests at ', v.request_hour, ':00') AS metric_summary,
  v.requests_in_hour AS anomaly_value, 0 AS baseline_value,
  v.explanation,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_off_hours v
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT requester, request_date, request FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs
  WHERE status_code = 200
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY requester, request_date ORDER BY request_time DESC) = 1
) i ON v.requester = i.requester AND v.request_date = i.request_date
WHERE v.severity IN ('HIGH', 'MEDIUM')

UNION ALL

-- 5. Sensitive Queries (prompt already in sub-view)
SELECT
  requester, NULL AS team, NULL AS department, request_date,
  CONCAT('SENSITIVE_QUERY_', sensitivity_type) AS anomaly_type, severity,
  LEFT(user_prompt, 80) AS metric_summary,
  1 AS anomaly_value, 0 AS baseline_value,
  explanation,
  LEFT(user_prompt, 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_sensitive_queries

UNION ALL

-- 6. Cost Spikes
SELECT
  v.requester, v.team, v.department, v.request_date,
  'COST_SPIKE' AS anomaly_type, v.severity,
  CONCAT('$', v.daily_cost, ' (', v.cost_multiplier, 'x normal $', ROUND(v.baseline_avg_cost, 2), ')') AS metric_summary,
  CAST(v.daily_cost * 100 AS BIGINT) AS anomaly_value,
  CAST(v.baseline_avg_cost * 100 AS BIGINT) AS baseline_value,
  v.explanation,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_cost_spike v
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT requester, request_date, request FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs
  WHERE status_code = 200
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY requester, request_date ORDER BY request_time DESC) = 1
) i ON v.requester = i.requester AND v.request_date = i.request_date
WHERE v.severity != 'NORMAL'

UNION ALL

-- 7. Guardrail Blocks (AI Gateway feature: content policy enforcement)
SELECT
  v.requester, v.team, v.department, v.request_date,
  CONCAT('GUARDRAIL_', v.guardrail_type) AS anomaly_type,
  v.severity,
  CONCAT(v.blocked_count, ' prompt(s) blocked [', v.guardrail_category, ']') AS metric_summary,
  v.blocked_count AS anomaly_value, 0 AS baseline_value,
  v.explanation,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_guardrail_blocks v
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT requester, request_date, request
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs
  WHERE status_code IN (403, 400)
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY requester, request_date ORDER BY request_time DESC) = 1
) i ON v.requester = i.requester AND v.request_date = i.request_date
WHERE v.severity IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM')

UNION ALL

-- 8. Rate Limit Breaches (AI Gateway feature: per-user daily token budget)
SELECT
  v.requester, v.team, v.department, v.request_date,
  'RATE_LIMIT_BREACH' AS anomaly_type,
  v.severity,
  CONCAT(v.rate_limited_count, ' request(s) blocked (', CAST(v.block_rate_pct AS BIGINT), '% of traffic hit limit)') AS metric_summary,
  v.rate_limited_count AS anomaly_value, 0 AS baseline_value,
  v.explanation,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS sample_prompt
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_rate_limit_breaches v
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT requester, request_date, request FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs
  WHERE status_code = 200
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY requester, request_date ORDER BY request_time DESC) = 1
) i ON v.requester = i.requester AND v.request_date = i.request_date
WHERE v.severity IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM')

ORDER BY request_date DESC, severity
v_cost_attribution:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_cost_attribution (
  department,
  destination_model,
  use_case_category,
  requests,
  input_tokens,
  output_tokens,
  cost_usd,
  pct_of_total_cost)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS WITH enriched AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')) AS department,
    u.destination_model,
    get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.use_case_category')                  AS use_case_category,
    u.input_tokens,
    u.output_tokens,
    CASE u.destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5'  THEN (u.input_tokens * 0.80 + u.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END AS cost_usd
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
  LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d ON u.requester = d.user_email
  WHERE u.status_code = 200  -- only count tokens for successful requests
)
SELECT
  department,
  destination_model,
  use_case_category,
  count(*)                   AS requests,
  sum(input_tokens)          AS input_tokens,
  sum(output_tokens)         AS output_tokens,
  round(sum(cost_usd), 2)   AS cost_usd,
  round(sum(cost_usd) * 100.0 / sum(sum(cost_usd)) OVER (), 1) AS pct_of_total_cost
FROM enriched
GROUP BY department, destination_model, use_case_category
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC
v_daily_usage:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_daily_usage (
  request_date,
  total_requests,
  active_users,
  total_input_tokens,
  total_output_tokens,
  total_tokens,
  avg_latency_ms,
  total_cost_usd,
  success_rate_pct,
  rate_limited_requests,
  guardrail_blocked_requests,
  error_requests,
  guardrail_triggered_count)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS SELECT
  request_date,
  count(*) AS total_requests,
  count(distinct requester) AS active_users,
  sum(input_tokens) AS total_input_tokens,
  sum(output_tokens) AS total_output_tokens,
  sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens,
  round(avg(latency_ms), 0) AS avg_latency_ms,
  round(sum(
    CASE destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (input_tokens * 3.0 + output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5'  THEN (input_tokens * 0.80 + output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 2) AS total_cost_usd,
  round(count_if(status_code = 200) * 100.0 / count(*), 1) AS success_rate_pct,
  count_if(status_code = 429) AS rate_limited_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 400) AS guardrail_blocked_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 500) AS error_requests,
  count_if(guardrail_triggered = true) AS guardrail_triggered_count
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
GROUP BY request_date
ORDER BY request_date
v_model_usage:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_model_usage (
  destination_model,
  destination_name,
  destination_type,
  request_date,
  requests,
  successful_requests,
  rate_limited,
  guardrail_blocked,
  total_tokens,
  avg_latency_ms,
  avg_ttfb_ms,
  cost_usd,
  success_rate_pct)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS SELECT
  destination_model,
  destination_name,
  destination_type,
  request_date,
  count(*)                                                              AS requests,
  count_if(status_code = 200)                                          AS successful_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 429)                                          AS rate_limited,
  count_if(status_code = 400)                                          AS guardrail_blocked,
  sum(total_tokens)                                                    AS total_tokens,
  round(avg(latency_ms), 0)                                           AS avg_latency_ms,
  round(avg(time_to_first_byte_ms), 0)                                AS avg_ttfb_ms,
  round(sum(
    CASE destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (input_tokens * 3.0 + output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5'  THEN (input_tokens * 0.80 + output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 2)                                                                AS cost_usd,
  round(count_if(status_code = 200) * 100.0 / count(*), 1)           AS success_rate_pct
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
GROUP BY destination_model, destination_name, destination_type, request_date
ORDER BY request_date, destination_model
v_team_consumption:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_team_consumption (
  team,
  department,
  total_requests,
  successful_requests,
  rate_limited_requests,
  guardrail_blocked_requests,
  team_members,
  total_tokens,
  total_cost_usd,
  cost_per_member_usd,
  avg_latency_ms,
  use_case_types)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS WITH enriched AS (
  SELECT
    u.*,
    COALESCE(d.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team'))       AS team_name,
    COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')) AS dept_name,
    CASE u.destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5'  THEN (u.input_tokens * 0.80 + u.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END AS cost_usd
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
  LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d ON u.requester = d.user_email
)
SELECT
  team_name                            AS team,
  dept_name                            AS department,
  count(*)                             AS total_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 200)          AS successful_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 429)          AS rate_limited_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 400)          AS guardrail_blocked_requests,
  count(distinct requester)            AS team_members,
  sum(total_tokens)                    AS total_tokens,
  round(sum(cost_usd), 2)              AS total_cost_usd,
  round(sum(cost_usd) / nullif(count(distinct requester), 0), 2) AS cost_per_member_usd,
  round(avg(latency_ms), 0)            AS avg_latency_ms,
  count(distinct get_json_object(request_tags, '$.use_case_category')) AS use_case_types
FROM enriched
GROUP BY team_name, dept_name
ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC
v_use_case_breakdown:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_use_case_breakdown (
  use_case_category,
  team,
  requests,
  successful_requests,
  guardrail_blocked,
  total_tokens,
  avg_tokens_per_request,
  cost_usd,
  unique_users)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS SELECT
  get_json_object(request_tags, '$.use_case_category') AS use_case_category,
  get_json_object(request_tags, '$.team')              AS team,
  count(*)                                             AS requests,
  count_if(status_code = 200)                         AS successful_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 400)                         AS guardrail_blocked,
  sum(total_tokens)                                   AS total_tokens,
  round(avg(total_tokens), 0)                         AS avg_tokens_per_request,
  round(sum(
    CASE destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (input_tokens * 3.0 + output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5'  THEN (input_tokens * 0.80 + output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 2)                                               AS cost_usd,
  count(distinct requester)                           AS unique_users
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
GROUP BY
  get_json_object(request_tags, '$.use_case_category'),
  get_json_object(request_tags, '$.team')
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
v_user_consumption:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_user_consumption (
  requester,
  team,
  department,
  role,
  total_requests,
  successful_requests,
  rate_limited_requests,
  guardrail_blocked_requests,
  total_input_tokens,
  total_output_tokens,
  total_tokens,
  avg_tokens_per_request,
  total_cost_usd,
  avg_latency_ms,
  first_request,
  last_request,
  active_days)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS SELECT
  u.requester,
  COALESCE(d.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team'))       AS team,
  COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')) AS department,
  COALESCE(d.role,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.role'))       AS role,
  count(*)                                   AS total_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 200)                AS successful_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 429)                AS rate_limited_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 400)                AS guardrail_blocked_requests,
  sum(u.input_tokens)                        AS total_input_tokens,
  sum(u.output_tokens)                       AS total_output_tokens,
  sum(u.total_tokens)                        AS total_tokens,
  round(avg(u.total_tokens), 0)              AS avg_tokens_per_request,
  round(sum(
    CASE u.destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5'  THEN (u.input_tokens * 0.80 + u.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 2)                                      AS total_cost_usd,
  round(avg(u.latency_ms), 0)                AS avg_latency_ms,
  min(u.event_time)                          AS first_request,
  max(u.event_time)                          AS last_request,
  count(distinct u.request_date)             AS active_days
FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d
  ON u.requester = d.user_email
GROUP BY u.requester,
  COALESCE(d.team, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team')),
  COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')),
  COALESCE(d.role, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.role'))
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
v_user_daily_trend:
CREATE VIEW gateway_demo.v_user_daily_trend (
  requester,
  team,
  department,
  request_date,
  daily_requests,
  rate_limit_hits,
  guardrail_blocks,
  daily_tokens,
  daily_cost_usd,
  avg_latency_ms,
  use_case_variety,
  rolling_7d_avg_requests,
  rolling_7d_avg_tokens)
DEFAULT COLLATION UTF8_BINARY
WITH SCHEMA COMPENSATION
AS WITH enriched AS (
  SELECT
    u.requester,
    COALESCE(d.team,       get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.team'))       AS team,
    COALESCE(d.department, get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.department')) AS department,
    u.request_date,
    u.total_tokens,
    u.latency_ms,
    u.status_code,
    u.guardrail_triggered,
    get_json_object(u.request_tags, '$.use_case_category')                  AS use_case_category,
    CASE u.destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (u.input_tokens * 3.0 + u.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5'  THEN (u.input_tokens * 0.80 + u.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END AS cost_usd
  FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
  LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory d ON u.requester = d.user_email
)
SELECT
  requester, team, department, request_date,
  count(*)                              AS daily_requests,
  count_if(status_code = 429)           AS rate_limit_hits,
  count_if(status_code = 400)           AS guardrail_blocks,
  sum(total_tokens)                     AS daily_tokens,
  round(sum(cost_usd), 2)               AS daily_cost_usd,
  round(avg(latency_ms), 0)             AS avg_latency_ms,
  count(distinct use_case_category)     AS use_case_variety,
  round(avg(count(*)) OVER (
    PARTITION BY requester
    ORDER BY request_date
    ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
  ), 1)                                 AS rolling_7d_avg_requests,
  round(avg(sum(total_tokens)) OVER (
    PARTITION BY requester
    ORDER BY request_date
    ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
  ), 0)                                 AS rolling_7d_avg_tokens
FROM enriched
GROUP BY requester, team, department, request_date
ORDER BY requester, request_date
